consent.title: Photo consent and authenticity
consent.summary: Before continuing, please confirm how your photos can be used and that your submissions are authentic.
points: Your uploaded photos may be used by CYCAT to showcase Earth Day Bingo impact.
All submissions must be original, taken by you, and not AI-generated or sourced online.
Submissions may be reviewed to verify authenticity and appropriate content.
consent.photoUseLabel: I allow CYCAT to use my uploaded photos.
consent.authenticLabel: I confirm my uploads are my own photos, not AI-generated, and not taken from the internet.
consent.note: You can proceed once the countdown finishes and both checkboxes are selected.

rules.title: Earth Day Bingo rules
rules.intro: Complete eco-actions, upload proof, and collect tickets for each completed line.

sections.title: How the game works
bullets: Complete a bingo tile by doing the action and uploading a photo proof.
Each completed row, column, or diagonal counts as one raffle ticket.
You can keep completing tiles to earn more tickets.

sections.title: Photo and authenticity policy
bullets: Uploaded photos must be original and taken by you.
AI-generated, edited from online sources, or copied images are not allowed.
Submissions may be reviewed for authenticity.

sections.title: Community expectations
bullets: No inappropriate behavior, photos, or usernames.
Be respectful in all submissions and interactions.
CYCAT may remove entries that violate these guidelines.

sections.title: Consent notice
bullets: By participating, you consent to CYCAT using submitted photos for program highlights.
Your uploads are required for completing tiles.
